name: Moist Chocolate Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, beat egg whites with salt until they form stiff peaks but are not dry.
2. Gradually add in half of the sugar to the beaten egg whites and mix well.
3. In a separate bowl, beat yolks very well and add the remaining sugar, mixing thoroughly.
4. Add orange juice, lemon juice, water, and cocoa to the yolk mixture and combine gently.
5. Gently fold the cake flour into the egg white mixture until just combined.
6. Carefully fold in the chopped nuts.
7. Pour the batter into a greased 9-inch cake pan and bake at 325°F for 45 minutes or longer, or until set.
8. Invert the cake onto a wire rack to cool completely before removing from the pan.
